items.headline: Doyle leaves game with left side contusion, Rockies to provide update

news_items.headline: Rockies place Brenton Doyle on the IL, select Chad Stevens, make additional roster moves
news_items.summary: The Rockies also DFA’d LHP Carson Palmquist and made a pitching change.

news_items.headline: Mets 2, Nationals 1: Peterson and the pen spin a gem
news_items.summary: Bo Bichette’s big hit and a very good day from the Mets’ pitching staff gave the team the win.

news_items.headline: Mock draft: Shift in the top five, after that, uncertainty abounds
Game #50 GameThread: Jays @ Yankees
news_items.summary: Just in case I don’t get home before game time, use this as the game thread. I expect to be home before, but best laid plans and all. I’m looking forward to seeing how Spencer Miles does tonight. He’s been terrific in this role. I’m thinking they could skip the opener thing, but i don’t […]

news_items.headline: Bo Bichette's two-run hit the difference as Mets hold on for 2-1 win against Nationals
news_items.summary: Thanks mostly to dominant pitching, especially from the bullpen, the Mets squeezed out a 2-1 win over the Nationals in Washington, D.C. on Thursday.

news_items.headline: New York Yankees vs. Toronto Blue Jays: Carlos Rodón vs. Braydon Fisher
news_items.summary: Rodón makes his first home start of the year as the Bombers bid for a series win.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani for Junior Caminero: The failed trade that could've saved the Angels
news_items.summary: A new report from Ken Rosenthal details the Rays' failed pursuit of Ohtani that would've sent shockwaves throughout the big leagues.

news_items.headline: Buster Posey, sir, please sign a two-year extension ASAP
news_items.summary: Buster Posey is months away from having senioritis, but there are good reasons why he should stick around.
